summary: 此計畫旨在將 `Config` 模組遷移至 `Models\Config` 子目錄中。這包含移動 6 個配置類別檔案、更新其命名空間，以及修正全專案範圍內約 16 個檔案的 `using` 引用。 (This plan aims to migrate the `Config` module to the `Models\Config` subdirectory. This involves moving 6 configuration class files, updating their namespaces, and fixing `using` references in approximately 16 files across the project.)
